title: Junior Data Scientist
description: Entry-level Data Scientist role on our recommendations team. You'll build models with Python, scikit-learn and SQL, run A/B tests and communicate results. English-speaking team. Bachelor's in a quantitative field. 0-2 years experience welcome, recent graduates encouraged.
note: textbook fit: junior, Berlin, English, Python/SQL

title: Graduate Machine Learning Engineer
description: Graduate programme for ML engineers. Train and evaluate neural models with PyTorch, write production Python, work with our research team. English working language. NRW location, hybrid.
note: graduate ML in NRW — should score very high

title: AI Engineer (LLM Applications)
description: Build LLM-powered features: prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, FastAPI services, integrating the Anthropic and OpenAI APIs, Docker deployment. Junior to mid level, English-first team.
note: mirrors the iseremo internship stack almost exactly

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Analyze product funnels with SQL and Tableau, build dashboards, support experimentation. English ok, German B1 sufficient. Entry level, degree in a quantitative subject.

title: Data Scientist - Marketing Analytics
description: Data Scientist for campaign measurement. Ideally 2-3 years of experience with Python and SQL. German B2 is nice to have but not required; team works in English.

title: Data Scientist II
description: Remote within the EU. Statistical modelling and experimentation at scale. We expect independent ownership of projects end to end; you have shipped several production models before.
note: level II + independence expectations = not entry, not senior

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: BI analyst for supply-chain reporting. Strong SQL, Power BI. Communication with German warehouse teams — German B2 preferred, English possible. Some Excel legacy work.
note: B2 'preferred' softener, NRW — mid not high

title: Backend Engineer (some ML exposure)
description: Primarily a Go/Kubernetes backend role. You'll occasionally integrate model endpoints built by the ML team. No model development. Junior welcome.
note: track mismatch — backend job wearing an ML hat

title: Data Scientist - Power Trading
description: Quantitative modelling for intraday power markets. Deep knowledge of energy trading, market microstructure and regulatory frameworks expected from day one. Python required.
note: domain wall: energy trading knowledge 'from day one'

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Fully remote within the EU. You will own our clinical-imaging models. Requires prior experience shipping models in a regulated medical environment and close collaboration with radiologists.
note: regulated-medical prior experience = wall for a graduate

title: Werkstudent Data Science
description: Werkstudent position, 20h/week. Must be enrolled at a German university for the duration.
note: not enrolled at a German uni — hard drop

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyse von Bestandsdaten. Verhandlungssicheres Deutsch (C1) zwingend erforderlich, da täglicher Kontakt mit Fachabteilungen. SQL-Kenntnisse.

title: Data Scientist
description: Hybrid role in our Warsaw office, 3 days per week onsite. Python, SQL, English team.
note: EU but not attendable from Germany

title: AI Research Intern (unpaid)
description: Unpaid internship, 6 months, academic credit possible. LLM evaluation research.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Fully remote role, but US residents only due to contracting constraints. PyTorch, LLM fine-tuning.

title: Junior AI Engineer
description: Build AI chatbots and automation for our clients. Python, prompt engineering, some TypeScript. Junior welcome, English-first, hybrid in Bochum.
note: junior AI in the home city — must be top of digest

title: Data Engineer
description: Build Airflow DAGs and dbt models on Snowflake. 2 years of data engineering experience ideally. English team.
note: adjacent track (DE not DA/DS) but skills transfer; softened 2y

title: Applied Scientist (NLP)
description: Applied research on search relevance. PhD or equivalent research experience preferred; publication record is a plus. Python, PyTorch.
note: PhD 'preferred' only — softened, but signals a high bar
